The '''REPulsor-equipped SUBmersible carrier''' ('''REPSUB''') was a submersible vehicle produced by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]]. It was designed to move up to twenty troops into [[Water/Legends|water]]-filled areas. It required a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and co-pilot to operate, and was armed with a light [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]].

{{Veh-stub}}
